name: Barbell Bench Press
description: The ultimate compound movement for developing chest strength and upper body power.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
description: Isolate the lateral deltoids to build wider, more defined 3D shoulders.

name: Conventional Deadlift
description: A powerhouse movement that engages your entire posterior chain and core.

name: Barbell Back Squat
description: The king of leg exercises for building massive quads, hamstrings, and glutes.

name: Wide Grip Pull Ups
description: Build a wide V-taper back and improve your functional upper body strength.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
description: Targets the upper chest fibers for a more complete and aesthetic chest development.

name: Seated Military Press
description: Build powerful front delts and improve your overhead pressing stability.

name: Leg Press
description: Isolate the leg muscles with heavy volume without straining the lower back.

name: Barbell Bicep Curls
description: The classic movement for building peak bicep height and arm thickness.

name: Tricep Pushdowns
description: Target the lateral and medial heads of the triceps for massive horseshoe arms.
